headline: All You Need to Know About TransDigm (TDG) Rating Upgrade to Buy
summary: TransDigm (TDG) has been upgraded to a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy), reflecting growing optimism about the company's earnings prospects. This might drive the stock higher in the near term.

headline: TransDigm (TDG) Up 4% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
summary: TransDigm (TDG) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.
